title: ATAH Referral Connection (Component 3)
description: ATAH Core Protocol object: Component 3 active mutual-connection record (spec/v0.8 §6.2). Created when a target professional accepts a `referral-proposal`; persists until either party withdraws, on which the record is deleted. Used by Discovery for one operational purpose only — de-duplication of `request_intent: 'referral_partner_search'` results: while a connection is active, neither party appears in the other's referral-partner Discovery results. Connection records are NOT used as a competence or trust signal anywhere in the protocol; v0.8.2 has no relationship metadata beyond what is required for the de-duplication function. Required for any ATAH-conformant implementation.

professional_a_id.description: The professional who proposed the connection. Stored to identify the originating direction; the de-duplication logic is symmetric over the pair.

professional_b_id.description: The professional who accepted the proposal. Stored as the second member of the connected pair; the de-duplication logic is symmetric over the pair.

category_scope.description: Profession categories the connection covers, carried over from the originating proposal.

originating_proposal_id.description: Reference to the proposal record that produced this connection. The proposal record itself is deleted on acceptance; this id is retained for audit provenance.
